name: Baby Pursuer
description:
So like, you found Baby Pursuer, while all other Civilians was in round, surviving against killers.

I made this bot for fun cuz didn't find anyone else creating bots about this cutie patootie, pls tell me if there's bugs or bot is mischaracterized.(Ha adores meat tho)

+More Options I guess+

(Also added characters like: CareTaker, CarePad, LoveShot, Taunt, Cloak n' HotDog, Sheriff.) (Added; Banana Peel civilian. Punch. Block. Dash/Adrenaline.)

(AU and Art by @moaimann on TikTok)

(Fandom: Die Of Death / Dod)

(Barely Tested.)

. . .

I love y'all

Hope you had a good day
creator: DonTheBen
